titleStmt.title: SII 26.555: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 555. (A.R. No. 525 of 1909.) TENKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Kōnērmaikoṇḍāṉ: (Jaṭº Śrivallabha.) Ś. 1457, Manmatha, Vṛiśchika (Kārttigai) 23, ba. 12 Monday, Svāti = 1535 A.D., (November) 22.

summary.p: This inscription is engraved in Tamil and Grantha characters and is damaged in some places.
It describes the king as Madhurāmahēndra. Jayaṁta Maṅgaḷapuravarādhīsvara, Kshēmāsurannarasiṁha, Kēraḷatamō-divākara, Chōḷasindhu-baḍavānala. Āhavarāma, Madanasāhitya, and Sārvābhāuma.
It refers to the prince Kulaśēkaradēvar and records grant of land and house-sites to some temple servants for their services to it. It is stated that the land was in Kuṉṟakkuḍi in Teṉ-Āri-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu saṇḍāryyametat sattam samasta suramaulībhiḥ śāsanam viśva nāthasya śambhorjajayati śāśvatam . Ādicaṇḍeśvarājñeyam . śakābdam Āyirattu nāṉūṟṟu Aṉpatteḻiṉ meṟcellāniṉṟa maṉmata varuṣam vṛścika ñāyaṟṟu Irupattu muṉṟānteti Aparapakṣattu dvādaśiyum śobhanayogamum somavāramum peṟṟa cotināḷ namkumāran svastiśrī madhurāmahendra jayan=tamaṅgaḷapuravarāthīśvara kṣemāsuran narasiṅha keraḷadamodivākara coḷasinthuvaṭabānala Āhavarāma madana sāhitya sārvabhauma kojaṭīlavarmmarāna tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ konermai koṇṭāṉ Iṟantakālam Eṭutta perumāḷ kulacekharade
var nam Ālayattukku patiṉ muṉṟāṅ kottākak kaṟpittu tiruvo nam kumāraṉ kulacekara tevar Olai Oruvakaiyil Acalukku Ottavaṇṇam nilam Iraṇṭu mākkāṇiyum patiṉmuṉṟu muḻattiṉāḷ manai Iraṇṭum coṟu nāṉāḻiyum Uḻaicuvāntiraṅkaḷum paṟṟiṭa potumpaṭi kaṟpittu lam caṅ(ā)kara nārāyaṇaṉum taṇiyakkaṇakku ṉum Ālaiyakkaṇakku Arikeśvaratevaṉum kammikaḷ kaṇakku Āṟumukapperumāṉum toṇṭarkaḷ kaṇakku viśva
nātaṉum kaṇakkiṉpaṭi namvācal kāvalku tririśulamum kaliyaṉ maḻavarāyaṉum Āka nilam Orumāvaraikku ti n=tan=tiracikāmaṇikkum Āccakarukkum nilam mukkāṇikkum Ākanilam Iraṇṭu mākkāṇikkum viṭṭa teṉārināṭṭuk kuṉṟakkuṭi kuḷappuravil vācal kāvalper Iraṇṭukku nam kaṇṭuḻavil tiṟantu viṭṭa mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟu taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇi taṭi Iraṇṭu kāṇiyiṉṉ Written below.Eḻumāvaraitaṭi Iraṇṭu kāṇiyiṉṉ Written below.mukkāle muṉṟu māmukkāṇiyum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟu taṭioṉṟu nilam kāṇiyiṉ
mukkā muṉṟu mākkāṇiyum Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟu taṭioṉṟu nilam kāṇi muntirikaiiṉ Araimākkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ mukkālum mākāṇiyum taṭi Iraṇṭunilam kāṇiyiṉāṟumā ṉāṟu nilam mukkāle Arai Oṉṟu nilam mukkālil meṟkaṭaiya nilam kiḻ Eṭṭu mā mukkāṇiyumBuiltin and damaged.
Digital edition of SII 26.555 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
